source_name: AEMO NEM generation by fuel type

fields.scope: National Electricity Market (NEM) — covers QLD, NSW, ACT, VIC, TAS, SA. Excludes SWIS (WA) and NT (DKIS / regulated). Cross-reference DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics for whole-of-Australia generation including SWIS and NT.
fields.primary_source_document: AEMO Data Dashboard / Quarterly Energy Dynamics report. OpenNEM (opennem.org.au) republishes the same dispatch data with cleaner CSV access under CC-BY.
fields.keying_plan: Key annual TWh totals per fuel from AEMO QED (Q4 + full-year edition) or OpenNEM 'Annual' report. Record the financial-year-vs-calendar-year basis explicitly.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed annual NEM generation mix (TWh per fuel) from AEMO Quarterly Energy Dynamics. OpenNEM provides clean CSV access. Keep WA SWIS and NT DKIS clearly separate.
